steps.title: Identify what the title represents
steps.content: The key signal: the blank requires a word for what the title does to convey Östersund's food culture—i.e., what it indicates or expresses.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: Denotes means to indicate or be a sign of something—exactly what a UNESCO title does when it marks Östersund as having a vibrant food culture. The other choices fail because they either contradict the positive context or describe unrelated actions. That matches choice D — D is correct.
